series_metadata.series_description: The schedules, analyses, transcripts, memoranda and other documents obtained or created by the Auditor of State during an examination, analysis, or inspection of Auditees prescribed in Chapter 117 O.R.C. and/or other relevant Chapters or Sections of the Ohio Revised Code that are necessary for the Auditor of State to maintain to support conclusions made in a report.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: seven (7) years from audit report release date ; Paper: while needed
